description.short: Triage and investigate New Relic alerts directly in Teams
description.full: AlertTriage is a bot that reads New Relic alert cards in your channels, queries live data from NerdGraph, and returns triage briefs or deep root cause investigations. Tag @AlertTriage in a thread under an alert to get started.

commands.title: triage
commands.description: Quick status check — tag me in an alert thread or type: triage <service name>

commands.title: investigate
commands.description: Deep root cause analysis — tag me in a thread or type: investigate <service name> - <time>

commands.title: triage
commands.description: Quick status check for a service: triage <service name>

commands.title: investigate
commands.description: Deep investigation: investigate <service name> - failed at <time>
